seo.title: Jolan Chappaz - Tattooer, visual artist & Poet
seo.description: Jolan Chappaz — Handpoke tattooer, visual artist and poet based between Geneva and Villars-sur-Ollon, Switzerland.
seo.keywords: Jolan Chappaz, tattoo, handpoke, handpoke, Geneva, Switzerland, Swiss folk art, poetry, paintings, Nuit Noire Tattoo
